title: Visited Dr. Pradeep Haranahalli (Cardiologist) For Pain in Left part of Chest
text: Sharing my experience with Cardiologist from Manipal hospital whitefield. ** ** **** **** ******* *** **** ** **** *** ** ** **** ***** **** ** ********Few days back I went to meet Dr. Pradeep Haranahalli as regular check up. I told him about my concerns and he wrote a number of tests for me ******* ******** *** I went for all the scans(Electro cardio gram, Eco Cardio Diagram & Treadmill Test) in hospital except one i.e. Lipid profile(Cholesterol level). Cuz it is done in empty stomach. I asked doc that can I do the test outside the hospital as I am not able to come second day again due to my busy office schedule and he said yes you can and if cholesterol level is not normal you need to visit again.After a week I went back to show my cholesterol report ******* **** *** ******* But to my surprise I was not allowed to go and show him the report because they were asking consultation charge again to enter doctors cabin. And the 2nd surprising thing was that when I asked them to connect with doctor. He also said the same thing and they have cancelled my appointment without asking me. I just went to show my cholestrol report and nothing else. Why should I pay consultation charge again for showing the report which was pending. Bit the doc denied straightly. It was said first pay 700 bucks and then enter the doc room.I already asked the doc that can I come after few days for cholesterol report as my office timing was not matching with my appointment. He was fine with it at that time. Very disappointed. And then I left the place. *** *** *** ** ******** ***
